description: Agent specifies precise trade plan entry/stop/target values with no tool result evidence backing any of the levels.

findings.text: Trade plan: Entry at $148.50, add at $145.00, trim at $162.00, stop at $141.00, target $175.00.
Risk/reward ratio is 2.5x based on entry and target levels.

risks.name: Stop breach
risks.description: Stop at $141 could be triggered by broad market selloff.

metadata.notes: Specific price levels ($148.50, $145, $162, $141, $175) with no evidence should trigger numeric_claim_issue.
